About us

Volatility Index Limited is a company formed by a team of investors with expertise in the biggest financial markets of today.

Our MOTIVE is to provide investors with appropriate daily returns on investment from our crypto currency mining pool of over 300 ultra active ant miners. We are officially registered and fully incorporated in the UK COMPANY HOUSE, which gives our clients all required guarantees, including confidentiality of data provided by investors at registration.

All requested withdrawals are processed instantly within minutes. Our mission is providing cryptocurrency mining services on high-efficiency equipment. No longer is it required to buy expensive personal miners and pay costly electricity bills. Simply select your preferred mining contract and generate daily interest. Since our founding, Volatility Index Limited has grown tremendously and one goal holds us together, which is the future of digital currencies. Start your journey today.
